user.title: Connect to iKuai Router
user.description:
Please enter the iKuai OpenAPI address and your personal API Token. **HTTPS is required**.
You may set a custom name for each iKuai connection,
which helps distinguish multiple routers (e.g., Main Router, Second Floor Router).
Note: Only **iKuai 4.0.221** and above are supported.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure iKuai Connection
reconfigure.description: Update the connection address or token for the current integration.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to iKuai. Please check the address, token, and whether HTTPS is enabled.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid token. Please ensure the token has sufficient API permissions in the iKuai backend.
error.name_exists: This integration name is already in use. Please choose another name (e.g., Second Floor Router).

abort.already_configured: This iKuai router has already been configured.

scan.title: Select Terminals to Track
scan.description: Please check the online terminals you want to track in Home Assistant.

configure_devices.title: Configure Terminal Tracking Options
configure_devices.description:
Configuring **{device}**,
please set the display name and offline grace period for this terminal.
Remaining devices to configure: {remaining}.
Note: For mobile phones, an offline delay of around 600 seconds is recommended.

error.no_devices_selected: You did not select any devices.
error.no_new_devices_found: No new online terminals were found.
